CB伊達CZと結んだCB上杉CZはCB出羽CZへ侵攻。
CB最上CZの本拠・CC山形城CZにほど近いCC長谷堂城CZまで
迫り、間断なく攻め手を加え続けた。
direct_pc_source_evidence.en: Allied with the CBDate ClanCZ, the CBUesugiCZ had invaded CBDewaCZ territory. Their incessant onslaught led them all the way to CCHasedª CastleCZ, not far from the CBMogamiCZ headquarters of CCYamagataCZ.

他们直逼CB最上CZ的根据地CC山形城CZ附近的
CC长谷堂城CZ，并不间断地展开进攻。
direct_pc_source_evidence.tc:

直逼CB最上CZ根據地CC山形城CZ附近的CC長谷堂城CZ，

自應仁文明大亂以來的150多年間，
眾多強者於戰場凋零的戰國時代，

direct_pc_source_evidence.en: After his return to CCAzuchi CastleCZ, CANobunagaCZ has abandoned his old retainers, including CAHashibaCZ and  CAShibataCZ. He is now an independent clan with few retainers like CAYasukeCZ.
